name: EMPIRE PETROLEUM CORP
summary: Empire Petroleum Corp is an oil and natural gas exploration and production company. It focuses on developing proved reserves, operating wells, and conducting workover and recompletion activities. The company produces crude oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids (NGLs), with operations including development wells, enhanced oil recovery (EOR) projects, and acreage management, primarily working within established basins and reservoirs.

products.name: Crude Oil
products.description: Production and sale of crude oil from operated and non-operated wells.

products.name: Natural Gas
products.description: Production and sale of natural gas from proved reservoirs.

products.name: Natural Gas Liquids (NGLs)
products.description: Production and sale of NGLs including ethane, propane, isobutane, normal butane, and natural gasoline.

partnerships.description: XTO is referenced as a related party in operations context within the filing.
